title: Savannah Energy Sees 12% Rise in Nigeria Cash Collections, Posts Strong FY 2025 Update - FinancialEDGE
description: Savannah Energy Plc, the British independent energy company focused around the delivery of Projects that Matter, has released its financial and operational update on its Nigerian operations and other markets in Africa, including up-to-date cash collections in its Nigerian business. The update shows that its gross production in Nigeria averaged 18.8 Kboepd for FY 2025,
html: Savannah Energy Plc, the British independent energy company focused around the delivery of Projects that Matter, has released its financial and operational update on its Nigerian operations and other markets in Africa, including up-to-date cash collections in its Nigerian business.
